title: Extruding and Drawing Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines to extrude or draw thermoplastic or metal materials into tubes, rods, hoses, wire, bars, or structural shapes.

tasks.text: Measure and examine extruded products to locate defects and to check for conformance to specifications, adjusting controls as necessary to alter products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine setup procedures and select machine dies and parts, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machines and set controls to regulate vacuum, air pressure, sizing rings, and temperature, and to synchronize speed of extrusion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reel extruded products into rolls of specified lengths and weights.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install dies, machine screws, and sizing rings on machines that extrude thermoplastic or metal materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change dies on extruding machines, according to production line changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Troubleshoot, maintain, and make minor repairs to equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh and mix pelletized, granular, or powdered thermoplastic materials and coloring pigments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test physical properties of products with testing devices such as acid-bath testers, burst testers, and impact testers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load machine hoppers with mixed materials, using augers, or stuff rolls of plastic dough into machine cylinders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust controls to draw or press metal into specified shapes and diameters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace worn dies when products vary from specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select nozzles, spacers, and wire guides, according to diameters and lengths of rods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate shearing mechanisms to cut rods to specified lengths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
